data.title: SK hynix launching U.S. arm 'AI Company' for AI solutions, targeting global market growth. Aims to accelerate AI advancement.
data.description: AI Company is positioning itself as a crucial player in the AI data center ecosystem. Serving as the central hub for SK Group's AI initiatives, the company is dedicated to driving the progress of AI technology worldwide, with a focus on markets in the United States and South Korea. As part of this commitment, SK hynix, a subsidiary of AI Company, will be taking proactive measures to capitalize on the opportunities presented by the emerging AI era.

data.title: C1 Fund (NYSE: CFND) reports first company exit post-IPO - BitGo's successful IPO in less than six months.
data.description: C1 Fund Inc. in Palo Alto revealed that its portfolio company, BitGo, has successfully concluded its IPO. This development stands as C1 Fund's initial portfolio company exit within half a year of the fund's IPO. BitGo specializes in offering institutional digital asset custody and infrastructure services, facilitating secure storage, compliance, and settlement for financial entities in the digital asset sector. The company achieved this milestone with a valuation exceeding [INSERT VALUATION NUMBER HERE].

data.title: HBX Group's Q1 2025 revenue of €170m, up 5% constant currency, with TTV of €2.0bn, up 16%. Growth strategies in place.
data.description: HBX Group International Plc reported a strong Q1 trading update, with revenue of €170m, up 5% in constant currency. Total Transaction Value (TTV) reached €2.0bn, showing a 16% increase in constant currency. The company's growth was attributed to their customer-centric approach, agile strategies, and increased use of Artificial Intelligence in operational processes. They also announced a €100m share buy-back program and plans to start paying dividends in FY26. The company's FY26 outlook is positive, with sustained booking momentum at the start of Q2. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Jeff Bezos' net worth rose by $5.7 billion to $266 billion as Amazon shares surged, closing in on Larry Page, as Elon Musk remains the richest.
data.description: The founder of Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN), Jeff Bezos, saw his net worth rise by $5.7 billion to reach $266 billion as reported by the Bloomberg Billionaires Index on Wednesday. This increase occurred after the e-commerce company's shares surged due to plans of closing physical stores. In contrast to last week, where six of the top 10 billionaires experienced a decline in wealth in the year 2026, Bezos managed to add $300 million to his fortune. Currently, he holds the title of the world's third-richest individual, closely trailing Google's (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) co-founder Larry Page. The wealthiest position continues to be held by Tesla's (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk, with a staggering net worth of $677 billion. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: NetEase Cloud Music Inc. will report fiscal year 2025 results on Feb 11, 2026. Leading music streaming service in China.
data.description: In Hangzhou, China, on January 28, 2026, NetEase Cloud Music Inc. (HKEX: 9899) shared that they are a prominent interactive music streaming service provider in China. They revealed plans to disclose their financial performance for the fiscal year 2025, closing on December 31, 2025.

data.title: Atos acknowledged as top in IT/OT cybersecurity services by PAC in 2025. France's PAC Innovation Radar report.
data.description: In 2025, Atos was acknowledged as a top performer in IT/OT cybersecurity services in France by PAC Innovation Radar. Their exemplary services and expertise in this field propelled them to be recognized as the best in class, highlighting their commitment to providing exceptional cybersecurity solutions. This recognition emphasizes Atos's leading role in the industry, showcasing their dedication to delivering top-notch IT/OT cybersecurity services.

data.title: Wix's Board approves $2 billion share repurchase program over 2 years (FY2026-2027) for ordinary shares and/or convertible notes.
data.description: Wix.com Ltd., under the ticker symbol NASDAQ: WIX, declared a new investment plan today. The company's Board of Directors sanctioned a 2-year initiative, running from fiscal years 2026 to 2027, aimed at buying back its securities. Wix has allocated funds of up to $2 billion for repurchasing its own ordinary shares and/or convertible notes through this program.

data.title: Britebound and Jamie Oliver partner to provide food career opportunities for US youth.
data.description: In Boston on January 28, 2026, Britebound™, formerly known as American Student Assistance® (ASA), a nonprofit organization focused on reshaping career exploration and post-high school planning for youth, revealed a collaboration with Jamie Oliver, renowned British chef and restaurateur. This partnership aims to enhance opportunities for young individuals to explore career options and achieve success after high school.

data.title: Funding Circle receives Silver Fair Payment Code accreditation, reinforcing support for UK small businesses.
data.description: A prestigious recognition has been awarded to Funding Circle, the top SME finance platform in the UK. They have proudly achieved the Silver accreditation for the Fair Payment Code.
